name: Taco Salad with Cumin Dressing (Wedman 2)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the tortillas on a baking sheet in a 400°F oven for about 10 minutes. While hot, sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Cool and break into bite-size pieces.
2. Chop the lettuce and arrange it in the bottom of a salad bowl.
3. Make the cumin dressing by combining salt, vinegar, pepper, garlic powder, lemon juice, mustard, ground cumin, water, and vegetable oil in a bowl or jar.
4. Heat the turkey in a skillet with the cumin seeds.
5. Sprinkle chunks of turkey over the lettuce.
6. Add the tomato pieces and cheese.
7. Pour on the cumin dressing and top with tortilla chips.
